notes: Felipe raised a coefficient-normalization question about the factorial convention for a differential operator. It does not challenge the explicit final map; the convention should be checked against the full coordinate equations before changing the exposition. [Source](https://terrytao.wordpress.com/2026/07/21/a-digestion-of-the-jacobian-conjecture-counterexample/comment-page-1/#comment-693557)

scope: The double-root hyperplane slice in the binary-linear-times-binary-quadratic multiplication model.

sources.title: A digestion of the Jacobian conjecture counterexample

statement: In the binary-form multiplication model of the counterexample, the resultant-one double-root slice is polynomially isomorphic to affine three-space.
title: The double-root resultant slice is affine three-space
